channel.title: Make Some Noise
channel.description: Latest releases from Make Some Noise on Dropout.tv

item.title: Different Language Office
item.description:
Zach, Jess, and Paul learn new Santa lore and voice puppets.

Duration: 35:29

Tags: Make Some Noise, sam reich, game shows, sound effects, competitions, impressions, improv, imitation, zach reino, jessica mckenna, paul f. tompkins

item.title: Jacob, Kurt, and Angela Have Fun with Filters
item.description:
Jacob, Kurt, and Angela become experts on music and prove that they're hot.

Duration: 32:33

Tags: Make Some Noise, sam reich, game shows, sound effects, competitions, impressions, improv, imitation, jacob wysocki, kurt maloney, angela giarratana
